A tribute to our friendship

To My
Cupcake 🧁

Some people arrive in your life and change everything — you are one of those rare people who made mine infinitely better. This page is for you. ✨

always here

5km finishers 🏅

Our First Ever Marathon 🏃

The Play Pink Run 2026 — 5KM, two medals, and memories we'll never forget.

We earned these 🥇

tap to flip ↩
🥇

The Medals

Every step hurt, every breath was earned — but we crossed that finish line together. These medals? They mean everything. 🏅

tap to close ↩

Post-run vibes 🎀

tap to flip ↩
🏃

Still Standing!

5KM done and you still managed to look this cool. Honestly, you make everything look effortless. 💪

tap to close ↩

I AM A FINISHER 🙌

tap to flip ↩
🙌

Finishers!

We signed up, we trained (sort of), and we ran every single kilometre. FINISHERS — and nobody can take that from us! 🎉

tap to close ↩

From the Heart

Words For You

"

We may have wandered in different chapters, but every time our paths cross, it feels like the story was meant to be re-read.

— Muffin

"

Time may have kept us apart, but the moment I saw you again, it was like no time had passed at all — just magic waiting to be rekindled.

— Muffin

"

I've realized that some friendships aren't just moments — they're constellations in the sky of our lives. You're the brightest star in mine.

— Muffin

"

From childhood to now, every moment we reconnect feels like a spell of fate — we're not just friends; we are forever woven together.

— Muffin

"

I won't let the years slip away again — your presence is the magic I didn't know I was missing, and now that you're back, I want you in every chapter of my life.

— Muffin

Our Journey

Milestones of Our Friendship

Year One

The day we first met — little did I know, that moment would change everything. We clicked instantly and there was no looking back.

A Memorable Trip

Our first adventure together. We got hopelessly lost, laughed until we cried, and somehow ended up exactly where we needed to be.

The Hard Times

When life got difficult, you were the one who showed up — no questions asked, no conditions attached. I'll never forget that.

Today & Always

Years in and we're still here — older, wiser, and somehow even closer. Here's to every chapter still ahead of us. 🥂

🫶

"Thank you for being you."

Made with love · Just for you

♪ Our Song
🔊
